info.name: Grofast API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Grofast API - E-commerce Grocery Delivery Platform

This collection includes all API endpoints organized by role:
- Authentication & User Management
- Customer Operations (Cart, Orders, Payments)
- Admin & Shopkeeper Management
- Delivery Boy Operations
- SuperAdmin System Management

Base URL: http://localhost:8000
